## Plugin reference

- Description: UUID field factory (uuidField) for building field records.
- Core:
  - Uses: `fields.FieldDef`, `fields.FieldMeta`, `fields.pickMeta`, `fields/uuid.uuidFieldType`
  - Exports: Types: `UuidFieldDef`; Values: `uuidField`
